name: Ingest user input
description: Read the user's text and available image reference before deciding the next step.
inputNeeded: User text and optional image path.
completionCriteria: The available input channels are identified.
failureRisk: Missing an image or treating an empty text field as enough context.

name: Detect intent
description: Map the request to one or more reusable intent labels.
inputNeeded: Normalized user input.
completionCriteria: At least one intent label is selected with a short rationale.
failureRisk: Selecting a solution intent when clarification is required.

name: Classify task type
description: Decide whether the request is atomic, composite, ambiguous, urgent, or multimodal.
inputNeeded: Detected intent labels and input type.
completionCriteria: A single task type is selected.
failureRisk: Treating urgent composite work as a normal long-term plan.

name: Check clarification need
description: Determine whether execution should pause for a targeted question.
inputNeeded: User message, image availability, and expected output.
completionCriteria: Clarification need is marked true or false.
failureRisk: Inventing missing details instead of asking.

name: Ask targeted question
description: Ask one concise question that unlocks the next executable task.
inputNeeded: The missing information category.
completionCriteria: The user receives a specific, answerable question.
failureRisk: Asking a broad question that does not reduce ambiguity.

name: Read image context
description: Extract visible learning content from a mock screenshot reference.
inputNeeded: A valid or placeholder image path.
completionCriteria: Visible topic, task object, and uncertainty are summarized.
failureRisk: Overstating details that are not visible.

name: Extract knowledge points
description: Identify the likely knowledge points behind the request.
inputNeeded: User input and image context if present.
completionCriteria: A short list of target knowledge points is produced.
failureRisk: Listing too many topics for the user's time budget.

name: Estimate urgency
description: Classify the user's time pressure as low, medium, or high.
inputNeeded: Time references and exam context.
completionCriteria: Urgency is mapped to a valid enum value.
failureRisk: Ignoring phrases such as tonight, tomorrow, or two hours later.

name: Prioritize high-yield topics
description: Rank topics by likely payoff under the user's constraints.
inputNeeded: Knowledge points and urgency.
completionCriteria: Topics are ranked with a brief reason.
failureRisk: Optimizing for completeness instead of exam payoff.

name: Compress review scope
description: Reduce a large study scope to the smallest useful subset.
inputNeeded: Candidate topics, urgency, and available minutes.
completionCriteria: Keep, defer, and skip categories are defined.
failureRisk: Removing a prerequisite needed for the selected task.

name: Build timebox plan
description: Allocate tasks into fixed time blocks.
inputNeeded: Available study time and prioritized tasks.
completionCriteria: A sequence of time blocks fits the user's budget.
failureRisk: Creating a plan that exceeds the available time.

name: Explain core concept
description: Explain the selected concept before practice or solution work.
inputNeeded: Target knowledge point and user's requested depth.
completionCriteria: Concept, simple example, and key warning are covered.
failureRisk: Jumping into problem solving before the concept is understood.

name: Solve example stepwise
description: Walk through a representative problem one step at a time.
inputNeeded: Problem statement or extracted image content.
completionCriteria: Each step includes the operation and reason.
failureRisk: Skipping reasoning and only giving the final answer.

name: Generate practice set
description: Create a small practice set aligned to the selected concept.
inputNeeded: Concept, difficulty target, and time budget.
completionCriteria: A few practice items and self-check answers are prepared.
failureRisk: Making practice harder than the user's current level.

name: Diagnose error pattern
description: Identify whether errors come from concept, calculation, reading, or strategy.
inputNeeded: Wrong answer context or user's error description.
completionCriteria: Primary error pattern and next correction are named.
failureRisk: Treating all mistakes as carelessness.

name: Map learning route
description: Order topics by prerequisite and review payoff.
inputNeeded: Topic list, screenshots, or course outline.
completionCriteria: A sequence with prerequisites and next action is produced.
failureRisk: Putting advanced topics before prerequisites.

name: Assemble composite plan
description: Connect selected atomic tasks into a coherent workflow.
inputNeeded: Task type, intent labels, and recommended template.
completionCriteria: Atomic tasks are ordered with dependencies implied by sequence.
failureRisk: Combining too many tasks for the user's goal.

name: Write expected output
description: Turn the internal plan into a concise user-facing response target.
inputNeeded: Selected task flow and output goal.
completionCriteria: Expected output is clear, bounded, and actionable.
failureRisk: Using vague output that cannot be evaluated.

name: Insert feedback check
description: Add a question that determines whether the user can proceed.
inputNeeded: The task that just completed.
completionCriteria: A specific feedback question is attached to the task.
failureRisk: Ending without a next-step decision.

name: Adjust plan from feedback
description: Modify the next action when the user says the current plan is too hard, too full, or unclear.
inputNeeded: User feedback and current task plan.
completionCriteria: Plan is shortened, reordered, or clarified.
failureRisk: Ignoring feedback and repeating the same plan.

name: Summarize priority decision
description: Explain why one item should happen before another.
inputNeeded: Prioritized topics or tasks.
completionCriteria: The top priority and rationale are stated.
failureRisk: Giving a ranking without a usable reason.

name: Mark skip items
description: Identify low-yield work that should be skipped under time pressure.
inputNeeded: Scope list and urgency.
completionCriteria: Skip items and risks are explicitly named.
failureRisk: Pretending the user can cover everything.

name: Create self-check
description: Create a quick check for whether the user has understood the current unit.
inputNeeded: Completed concept or practice task.
completionCriteria: Self-check question and pass/fail next action are defined.
failureRisk: Using a check that is too easy to reveal misunderstanding.

name: Log demo state
description: Record the current demo stage for frontend display.
inputNeeded: Current flow step and selected IDs.
completionCriteria: Demo state can be rendered without extra inference.
failureRisk: Losing the link between visible UI state and data IDs.
